title: Lancer Totem
description: The best thing about me is that I'm the only one!
body:
This is a resourcepack that changes your "Totem of Undying" into a "Lancer of Unsplatting" based on the character Lancer from hit indie game DELTARUNE by Toby Fox.

Features include:
- Splat noise when totem pops
- Animated Lancer Totem
- Changed advancement name and description when using totem for the first time
